raw_consumer_statement:
b'My Home Depot credit card was added second user and my mailing address was changed to second user address from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX without my permission,I reported fraud to Home Depot credit service and made many calls.

After discovering the unauthorized activity, I immediately reported the fraud to Citibank and requested 
that the charges be removed. Citibank conducted an investigation and later sent me a letter stating that 
the charges were considered valid because the card used contained an embedded chip and was used at a 
chip-enabled reader.

However, Citibanks conclusion fails to address the central issue of my complaint: an unauthorized individual 
gained access to my account, added themselves as a user, and changed my mailing address. Any card issued or 
used after those unauthorized changes would have been obtained through fraudulent access to my account.

I did not authorize the addition of any second user to my account, I did not authorize any address change, 
and I did not authorize the transactions in question.

I am requesting the following actions:

1. That Citibank reopen the fraud investigation.
2. That Citibank provide documentation showing how and when the authorized user was added to my account.
3. That Citibank provide documentation showing how and when the mailing address was changed.
4. That Citibank provide documentation of where any replacement card was mailed.
5. That the approximately $2,000 in unauthorized charges be removed from my account.

I believe the denial of my fraud claim is improper and does not comply with consumer protections under the 
Fair Credit Billing Act. I respectfully request the Consumer Financial Protection Bureaus assistance in 
resolving this matter.

Sincerely,
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXAccount: Home Depot Consumer Credit Card (Citibank) XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXattachment:  1.Last month statement I received before address was changed.
             2. requested statement after address was changed back.
             3. investigation decision letter.'
